title: Split PresenceStatusSetInput, ChatContactSetInput, SpaceUpdateInput
description:
Same pattern as I3A/I3B for three more update structs:

PresenceStatusSetInput { id, ... } -> presence_status_set(&session, id, &PresenceStatusPatch { ..Default::default() })
ChatContactSetInput { id, ... } -> chat_contact_set(&session, id, &ChatContactPatch { ..Default::default() })
SpaceUpdateInput { id, ... } -> space_update(&session, id, &SpacePatch { ..Default::default() })
